content.problemStatement:
Print each word of the below-given sentence on a new line.

`I love Codechef
`
content.outputFormat: Print the three words of the sentence "I love Codechef" each on a separate line, in the given order.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the three required words, each on its own line.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints the three words "I", "love", and "Codechef" each followed by a newline. To follow the template used in many beginner problems, we read an integer T (default 1) and repeat the printing T times. Since there is no input, T is hard‑coded as 1.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – only a constant number of characters are printed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few constant‑size variables are used.
